T-B1-004x further shows that inventory-angle matches are only partial and never line-local: 2/3 patterns have inventory/same-target matches, flat_pattern_02 has no inventory match, 0/3 patterns have line-local absorption candidates, and no accepted absorption certificate exists. directions.current_evidence: Stim/PyMatching baseline; closed reduced-round artifact boundary; T-B2-003 leakage-flagged analytic boundary; T-B2-004 Stim HERALDED_ERASE / DEPOLARIZE1 stress; T-B2-005 false-positive overhead stress; T-B2-006 posterior-calibrated shot-conditioned leakage boundary; T-B2-007 posterior-weighted decoder-risk ledger; T-B2-008 decoder-input contract feasibility gate; T-B2-009a per-shot decoder trace packet; T-B2-009b posterior-likelihood injection gate; T-B2-009c DEM-informed detector-to-edge semantics gate; and T-B2-009d hardware-like leakage observation model gate. The latest gate consumes 3 strict challenge rows across 3 observation profiles / 1728 profile-shots with 864 holdout profile-shots. The best conservative hardware-like profile changes 0 predictions, fixes 0 failures, introduces 0 failures, leaves 22 injected failures, and has holdout failure delta 0; the stress profile generates 727 model flag events but still fixes 0 failures. Holdout improvement remains false and route demotion remains recommended.
directions.main_blocker: The reduced-round lever remains closed as a small-distance/aggressive artifact. The heralded-erasure route now has per-shot traces, synthetic posterior-weight injection, DEM-informed edge semantics, and a detector-bitstring-driven hardware-like leakage observation model, but none improves failures. The model is still not calibrated, not hardware-derived, and not a production decoder. The route still lacks real calibrated leakage/flag observations, independent hardware traces, and distance-scaling runtime/threshold curves under calibrated posterior injection.
directions.next_experiment: Run T-B2-009e: replace the hardware-like observation model with real calibrated leakage/flag observations or independently supplied hardware traces, then require holdout improvement plus all-challenge non-regression before feeding B7.

directions.current_evidence: PySCF small-molecule proxy plus B10-T1 reaction-coordinate denominators; B3 artifacts now run through T-B3-011. T-B3-011 covers H2/LiH/H2O/N2 with bounded high-coefficient sampled UCC/ADAPT pressure: 35 sampled groups total, 384 shots/group, mean/max relative variance error 0.0833/0.5029, max optimizer-loop shots lower bound 475,043,013,690,000, max optimizer-loop 2Q lower bound 281,225,464,104,480,000, and selected-CI larger-basis denominator wins remain 0.
directions.main_blocker: The current one-parameter UCC/ADAPT plus QWC route is demoted: it lacks converged multi-parameter chemistry, full compiled covariance, all-group sampling, and any advantage win, while optimizer-loop lower bounds are prohibitive.
directions.next_experiment: Keep B3 as a negative-boundary track unless T-B3-012 produces real multi-parameter UCCSD/ADAPT covariance or stronger-than-QWC measurement that beats selected-CI/DMRG/tensor denominators after optimizer-loop accounting.
directions.technical_solution_target: Reaction-coordinate quantum resource estimate tied to observable error and classical baselines.

directions.current_evidence: Toy hidden-trap protocol rejects four spoofing families; shared B4/B8 CNOT hidden-projection refresh task runs 3 circuit-derived tasks / 192 configs with honest completeness 1.0, no-refresh high-leakage max soundness 0.675, and repaired high-leakage max soundness 0.0. T-B4-002a exports 36 OpenQASM 3 randomized-measurement verifier circuits with max 30 qubits including verifier ancillas and 0 Qiskit/Aer semantic mismatches. T-B8-003a adds a public-QASM packet spoofer gate: a deterministic parser/emulator predicts all 36 public packet transcripts, so public-packet protocol soundness is rejected. T-B8-003b separates public skeletons from private masks/flips for all 36 circuits, but public data transcripts remain deterministic and classically predictable; the contract passes 4/8 gates and fails 4/8. T-B8-003c adds non-stabilizer H plus T/RZ(pi/4) challenge-basis layers to all 36 skeletons, removes the deterministic transcript blocker for 36/36 pilot circuits, and records minimum min-entropy 4 bits with maximum output probability 0.0625. T-B8-003d attacks the pilot with four support-aware spoofer families: exact transcript success remains 0.0625, but support-only verifier acceptance is 1.0, so public support membership is rejected as a soundness condition. T-B8-003e adds a verifier-private predicate pressure gate: four late-bound private predicate bits reduce support-aware spoofer acceptance from public support-only 1.0 to hidden-private-predicate 0.0625, while one-bit leakage raises acceptance to 0.125 and full predicate leakage returns acceptance to 1.0.
directions.main_blocker: The exact transcript blocker survives and analytic verifier-private predicates suppress support spoofers, but this is still not a formal protocol or hardware result. Soundness still requires a formal private challenge protocol, real backend properties, hardware execution, and stronger learned/generative spoofers under leakage.
directions.next_experiment: Replace the analytic private-predicate pressure gate with a formal verifier-private challenge protocol or real-backend/hardware transcript burden, then rerun learned/generative spoofer gates with explicit leakage models.
directions.technical_solution_target: Circuit-level verifiable advantage task with explicit completeness/soundness against adaptive spoofers.

directions.current_evidence: Exact small Hubbard + cluster proxy; oracle-tuned and non-oracle response embedding denominators; exact-state-seeded MPS pressure; non-exact-state-seeded MPS/ALS; two-site finite-DMRG-style pressure; T-B5-005 canonical DMRG readiness gate; T-B5-006a canonical-environment smoke gate; and T-B5-006b same-access production contract gate on the same 9 B10 D5 Hubbard response rows. The readiness gate passes 0/8 conditions, the smoke gate passes 0/9 rows, and the production contract passes only 2/10 gates with no production DMRG, no sampling oracle, and no positive same-access route.
directions.main_blocker: The current tensor portfolio is a pressure ladder, not mature canonical-environment DMRG. Non-seeded prototypes beat seeded pressure on 0 rows; the production contract still has 5 blocking sampling requirements and no same-access quantum response kernel.
directions.next_experiment: Run T-B5-006: implement mature canonical-environment DMRG/MPS with stored environments, residuals, sweep convergence, no exact-state seeding, and full cost accounting while satisfying T-B5-006b; or compare a fully costed quantum impurity/response kernel against the full D5 denominator ladder.
directions.technical_solution_target: Hybrid quantum-tensor/embedding solver improving accuracy-per-resource on a meaningful correlated model.

No discovery, mechanism, complete-database, DFT, crystallographic-database, or computed-observable claim.
directions.main_blocker: Structural/electronic proxy channels now beat formula-only descriptors, but family-prior leakage still dominates and negative controls remain high in the ranked list. The proxy is curated/imputed, not real crystallographic, DFT, B5-DMRG, or quantum-observable data.
directions.next_experiment: Run T-B6-004: replace curated proxy channels with actual crystallographic, DFT, or B5-computed structural/electronic observables, then expand post-2008 negatives until family priors and random baselines cannot saturate.
directions.technical_solution_target: Leakage-controlled high-Tc candidate ranking pipeline using physics descriptors, not family priors.

T-B1-004aa adds a carrier blocker-stack gate: the 3 source-qubit-aligned radius-16 candidates are all blocked by target-touching CNOT stacks, with 15 blockers total, 14 touching the candidate qubit directly, 1 touching another target qubit, and accepted simple commutation-clearance/B7 reduction still 0. This is synthesis input only: semantic replay certificates, shorter rewrites, accepted occurrence removal, accepted proxy-T reduction, and B7 ledger improvement remain 0. It finds numerical exact reduced-CNOT candidates for 3/3 packets: candidate line 1378 reaches 1 CNOT from source 4, and candidate lines 1381 and 268 reach 2 CNOTs from source 5. Candidate CNOT reduction would be 9 if later accepted, but no full-circuit replay certificate, local-layer resource ledger, occurrence removal, proxy-T reduction, or B7 ledger improvement is accepted. This narrows the resource blocker, but accepted full-circuit replay certificates, occurrence removal, proxy-T reduction, and B7 ledger improvement remain 0 because five line-1381 off-grid local-U3 parameters still require exact decomposition or absorption. T-B1-004ap then consumes the single-step context gate and tests signed sums of two or three same-support context rotations for the five remaining line-1381 parameters: 44 context rotations, 3,784 width-2 signed combinations and 105,952 width-3 signed combinations per parameter, 548,680 total tests, 0/5 exact absorptions back to the pi/4 grid, best width-3 grid error 0.0015819911093339911, and accepted B7 reduction remains 0. T-B1-004as then converts the repaired-packet branch into a full-circuit replay obligation matrix: 3/3 bounded exact repairs remain, but symbolic exactness certificates, full-circuit replay events, replacement QASM patches, occurrence-class lifts, B7 ledger acceptances, accepted replay, accepted occurrence removal, and accepted proxy-T reduction are all 0.
directions.main_blocker: gcm_h6 remains factory-path dominated; cone_01 is still the concrete B1 rewrite target, but simple same-envelope routes are closed, no-carrier deletion is blocked, cache-only theta sharing is not accepted, and the physical cost-model proposal has shared object proposals, line-level replay verification, logical layout/routing packets, factory-amortization scaffold, shared-error budget scaffold, independent accounting baseline, and an explicit refreshed-ledger rejection, but still lacks occurrence-removing certificates, accepted physical device layout, physical factory schedule, and device-calibrated physical validation. B7 still has no physical resource claim. The newest local-equivalence invariant gate blocks local-only absorption for only 24 of the 30 required windows, leaving 11 invariant-flat windows open. The 11-window invariant-flat subset is now explicit and compressed to 3 shared-nonlocal-class packets, but same-envelope grid replacement has 0 exact passes and direct pi/4 exactification/shared grid signatures and plain local Clifford dressing fail, while a single non-Clifford carrier now exactifies all 3 packets but still leaves one arbitrary carrier per packet; T-B1-004v confirms that the current ledger sees the single-carrier result as occurrence replacement, not removal: 11 source flat occurrences receive 11 inserted carrier occurrences, accepted reduction remains 0, and even fully absorbing all carriers would still leave a 19-occurrence / 380 proxy-T B7 gap. T-B1-004w further rejects natural carrier coalescence: 3 distinct signatures, 0 cross-pattern shareable signatures, and only 160 optimistic proxy-T reuse. The packets require carrier absorption, replayable occurrence-removing certificates, a broader exact synthesis route, or an accepted physical model and remain insufficient alone; B7 still needs a 30-occurrence rewrite certificate set, an accepted physical theta-sharing/single-carrier model, or another audited resource-bearing route. T-B1-004x further shows that inventory-angle matches are only partial and never line-local: 2/3 patterns have inventory/same-target matches, flat_pattern_02 has no inventory match, 0/3 patterns have line-local absorption candidates, and no accepted absorption certificate exists. T-B1-004y further rejects neighborhood/commutation-only carrier absorption: only flat_pattern_01 has a radius-16/blocker-free same-target candidate, flat_pattern_02 has no same-target match, flat_pattern_03 is 99 lines away from its nearest same-target match, and no neighborhood absorption or commutation certificate is accepted. The next route must also beat T-B1-004z: source-alignment-only carrier matching fails because the only blocker-free nearby candidate is not source-line aligned. Future work must also beat T-B1-004aa: simple blocker-stack commutation clearing fails, so the next route needs a real CNOT-stack rewrite, semantic replay, broader occurrence-removing certificates, or accepted physical-model evidence. Future work must also beat T-B1-004ab: single reusable blocker-motif generalization fails, so a future route needs a real semantic CNOT-stack rewrite, broader occurrence-removing certificates, or accepted physical-model evidence. Future work must also beat T-B1-004ac: cheap CNOT-parity and adjacent duplicate-CNOT clearance fail, so a future route needs real semantic CNOT-stack synthesis/replay, broader occurrence-removing certificates, or accepted physical-model evidence. Future work must also beat T-B1-004ad: cheap single-qubit interleaving commutation fails, so a future route needs real semantic CNOT-stack synthesis/replay, broader occurrence-removing certificates, or accepted physical-model evidence. The current semantic packet gate is not yet a replay certificate or shorter rewrite. T-B1-004af is a numerical reduced-CNOT candidate gate, not an accepted replay certificate. The reduced-CNOT packet scaffold is also rejected by T-B1-004ag under local-U3 resource accounting. Direct pi/4 snapping of the reduced-CNOT local-U3 layers also fails replay, so the cheap exactification route is closed. Future work must also beat T-B1-004ai: sparse local-U3 repair recovers only line 1378, while line 1381 and line 268 remain unrepaired even with two free parameters. Future work must also beat T-B1-004aj: exactly-three-parameter local-U3 repair recovers line 268 but still leaves line 1381 unresolved. Future work must also beat T-B1-004am: the repaired packet route lowers the off-grid/proxy-T burden from 40/780 to 5/80, but the remaining five line-1381 off-grid local-U3 parameters still block symbolic replay, accepted occurrence removal, proxy-T reduction, and B7 ledger acceptance. T-B1-004ar then consumes the best bounded context hints from T-B1-004ap/aq and checks a replay-adjacent cheap commutation corridor: 10 best candidates, 32 context references, 8 unique context lines, 7 inside-packet references, 13 non-standalone references, 21 blocked corridor references, 0 clear external standalone-Z references, 0/10 accepted corridor candidates, and accepted B7 reduction remains 0. T-B1-004as adds a 17-blocking-obligation replay matrix, with line 1381 still carrying the unpriced off-grid packet burden and no accepted replay artifact.
directions.next_experiment: T-B1-004an exact-decomposition/full-circuit-replay gate: exact-decompose or absorb the five remaining line-1381 off-grid local-U3 parameters, emit symbolic full-circuit replay certificates for lines 1378, 268, and 1381, and propagate only accepted occurrence removals into the actual B7 ledger. Move beyond rejected simple exact-decomposition, single-step context absorption, and bounded two-/three-rotation context absorption by building four-or-more-rotation symbolic absorption, commutation-aware full-circuit replay with honest local-U3 resource pricing, or a different occurrence-removing scaffold. Move beyond rejected exact-decomposition, single-step context absorption, bounded two-/three-rotation context absorption, and exactly-four-rotation context absorption by building commutation-aware full-circuit replay with honest local-U3 resource pricing, a justified five-or-more-rotation symbolic route, or a different occurrence-removing scaffold. Move beyond rejected exact-decomposition, single-step context absorption, bounded two-/three-/four-rotation context absorption, and cheap commutation-corridor interpretation by building full symbolic/full-circuit replay with honest local-U3 resource pricing, a justified non-cheap commutation/resynthesis scaffold, or a different occurrence-removing route. directions.current_evidence: Hidden-invariant verifier, adaptive leakage stress, challenge refresh/rotation repair, shared B4/B8 circuit-refresh task, T-B4-002a OpenQASM 3 packet with 36 verifier circuits and 0 Aer semantic mismatches, trained/generative spoofer stress, B10-T2 proof gate, restricted lemma, transcript/device-noise bridge, ideal/noisy Aer bridges, and backend-calibrated-style GenericBackendV2 bridge with safe calibrated honest acceptance 1.0 and adversary acceptance 0.25. T-B8-003a public-QASM packet spoofer gate predicts all 36 public packet transcripts and rejects public-packet protocol soundness. T-B8-003b late-bound contract creates 36 public skeletons that hide private masks/flips, but the deterministic public data transcript remains classically predictable; 4/8 gates pass and 4/8 fail. T-B8-003c non-stabilizer late-bound transcript pilot adds H plus T/RZ(pi/4) challenge-basis layers, removes the deterministic transcript blocker for 36/36 pilot circuits, and records minimum min-entropy 4 bits with maximum output probability 0.0625. T-B8-003d support-aware spoofer gate covers four public-support spoofer families across 36 pilot circuits: max exact transcript success stays 0.0625, but max support-only acceptance is 1.0, rejecting support-membership soundness. T-B8-003e adds a verifier-private predicate pressure gate: hidden private predicate acceptance is 0.0625 versus public support-only acceptance 1.0, with a leakage boundary at 0.125 for one private bit leaked and 1.0 for full predicate leakage.
directions.main_blocker: The public/private boundary and non-stabilizer entropy remove single-transcript prediction, and private predicates suppress support-only spoofing in an analytic no-leakage model. Soundness still requires a formal private challenge protocol, real backend properties, hardware execution, or another non-public acceptance burden that survives leakage.
directions.next_experiment: Replace the analytic private-predicate model with a formal verifier-private challenge protocol or real-backend/hardware verifier bridge, then attack the resulting transcript with stronger learned/generative spoofers and explicit leakage models.
directions.technical_solution_target: Classical verifier whose soundness stays low under adaptive leakage through challenge refresh/projection rotation.

directions.current_evidence: 18-instance gap lab; 9 locality-preserving candidates; 0 accepted local candidates; finite-instance failed gap-amplification negative lemma with 4 strict width-trap counterexamples, 9 dense locality traps, and 5 proof obligations; Lean-style symbolic skeleton with 5 definitions, 3 theorem skeletons, and the same 5 open obligations; named-family cluster_stabilizer_open_uniform_reweight skeleton for n=4,5,6 showing all terms uniformly scaled by 1.35, max locality preserved at 3, raw gap amplified, normalized gap invariant, and the certificate rejected as global energy rescaling; local parametric certificate checker for n >= 4 formulas with exact scale 27/20, support set {2,3}, max locality 3, finite rows n=4,5,6, and normalized-gap invariance checked by a repo-local verifier; proof-environment readiness gate with 4/9 gates passed and explicit blockers for Lean, Lake, Lake/mathlib project files, placeholder theorem replacement, and proof-assistant checked theorem output.
directions.main_blocker: The named-family statement now has a local executable verifier and a proof-environment blocker, but it is still not proof-assistant checked over all n; the current PATH `lean` command exits with failure, `lake` is absent, no Lake/mathlib project files exist, and the named-family theorem remains a placeholder `True` obligation. It is not a Quantum PCP proof, NLTS theorem, local-Hamiltonian hardness theorem, or global gap-amplification impossibility result.
directions.next_experiment: Run T-B9-004: pin a real Lean 4/Lake/mathlib project or equivalent independently proof-checkable environment, make the cluster-stabilizer skeleton check inside it, replace the placeholder `True` theorem with an indexed Hamiltonian-family theorem, and formalize support-size, uniform-scaling, spectral-width, and normalized-gap invariance lemmas for all n >= 4.
directions.technical_solution_target: Formal restricted theorem or negative lemma about gap amplification/local-Hamiltonian hardness.

directions.current_evidence: B10-T1 includes explicit-I/O accounting, denominator notes/tables, B3/B5 denominator boundary comparison, missing-assumption and access-contract notes, B5 same-access bridge, response-sampler cost stress, B5 canonical DMRG readiness, B5 canonical-environment smoke gate, and T-B5-006b same-access production contract gate. The contract passes only 2/10 gates and preserves no-production-DMRG, no-sampling-oracle, no-positive-route, no-advantage, and no-BQP-separation boundaries.

directions.next_experiment: Run T-B10-014 with T-B5-006: replace the contract/cost/smoke-gate negative boundary with mature production DMRG/MPS or a real same-access response oracle with state-preparation, mixing, measurement, confidence, optimizer-loop, and classical-denominator costs.
directions.next_technical_experiment: Run T-B10-014 with T-B5-006: implement mature canonical-environment production DMRG/MPS for the same B5 Hubbard response rows, or construct a real same-access response oracle with state-preparation, mixing, measurement, confidence, optimizer-loop, and classical denominator costs that beats the full ladder; keep T-B10-009 for real backend verifier evidence.

downstream_translation_rule: No direction moves into publication, patent, financing, or productization as an active deliverable until it passes its technical gate.
